description: Phase 1: build match intelligence that beats generic ChatGPT previews with a deterministic facts layer, strict narrative schema, and post-match alignment evaluation.

userStories.title: Define match context schema and required fields
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a stable context schema so narratives are grounded in deterministic inputs and are reproducible.
acceptanceCriteria: Define context schema with required fields: form (last 5-10), xG/xGA trends, tactical proxies, injuries/lineups, Elo delta, schedule context
Schema documented with field types and allowed nulls
Context validation fails if required fields missing
Schema stored in repo
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/context_schema.py with dataclasses: MatchContext, TeamContext, TeamForm, TeamAbsences, HeadToHead, ScheduleContext, LeaguePosition, MarketOdds. validate_context() enforces required fields.

userStories.title: Inventory and validate data sources
userStories.description: As the founder, I need to know which data sources are reliable so the context layer is consistent and trustworthy.
acceptanceCriteria: List all data sources for form, xG, injuries, lineups, Elo and their update cadence
Identify gaps per league/season with a coverage report
Document failure modes and fallback rules
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/data_coverage.py. CoverageAnalyzer checks FBRef (xG), ClubElo, Market Odds, Understat (PPDA), Injuries. Generates coverage reports with recommendations.

userStories.title: Implement deterministic context builder
userStories.description: As the system, I need a consistent context payload per fixture so LLM output is grounded and repeatable.
acceptanceCriteria: Context builder outputs payload for >= 90% fixtures in a season
Payload includes all required fields per schema
Missing fields logged with reason codes
Context snapshots stored for audit/replay
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/context_builder_v2.py. ContextBuilderV2 builds strict-schema context with time-travel safe queries. Also preserves legacy MatchContextBuilder for backward compatibility.

userStories.title: Add data coverage diagnostics
userStories.description: As the founder, I need to see where missing data will reduce narrative quality so I can fix sources first.
acceptanceCriteria: Coverage report by fixture, team, and round
Coverage score stored per fixture
Missing signals summarized with counts
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/data_coverage.py with CoverageReport, FixtureCoverage, SeasonCoverage dataclasses. run_coverage_diagnostics() generates full reports.

userStories.title: Create strict narrative schema and prompt
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a strict narrative format so outputs are comparable and evaluatable.
acceptanceCriteria: Narrative schema includes: expected flow, key drivers, swing factors, risks, confidence band
Prompt references only context payload (no external info)
100% outputs validate against schema
No non-context facts in output
userStories.notes: Schema implemented in src/analysis/narrative_schema.py. Prompt integration exists in prompts/v4_evaluator.txt. validate_no_external_facts() checks for hallucinations.

userStories.title: Add schema validation for narratives
userStories.description: As the system, I need to enforce schema validation so malformed outputs do not leak into evaluation.
acceptanceCriteria: Schema validation rejects malformed outputs
Invalid outputs are logged with reason
Batch run summary includes invalid count
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/narrative_schema.py. validate_narrative() returns (is_valid, errors) tuple. parse_narrative() enforces typed output.

userStories.title: Post-match narrative alignment evaluator
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a consistent evaluator that scores narrative alignment and outcome accuracy post-match.
acceptanceCriteria: Evaluator outputs narrative score (0-100) and outcome accuracy (W/D/L)
Structured feedback and critical flags stored
Runs for >= 95% finished fixtures
Baseline prompt comparison supported
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/evaluator.py (AnalysisEvaluator) and src/analysis/validation.py (ValidationEngine). Scores stored in evaluations table.

userStories.title: Add time-travel safety checks for context
userStories.description: As the system, I must guarantee no future data leaks into pre-match context.
acceptanceCriteria: Context builder only uses matches before fixture date
Violations are logged and fail validation
Automated test covers time-travel guard
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/time_travel_guard.py. TimeTravelGuard validates context and database queries. validate_context_time_safety() convenience function available.

userStories.title: Phase 1 dashboard views
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a dashboard that shows narrative quality trends, best/worst analyses, and coverage gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Narrative quality trend by round
Best/worst analysis table with drilldown
Coverage diagnostics for missing data
Filters: season, league, prompt, round
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/dashboard.py with Streamlit. Includes quality trends, best/worst tables, and filtering by season/league/round.

userStories.title: Batch + iteration loop
userStories.description: As the founder, I need a repeatable batch run + evaluation loop to promote or roll back prompt changes.
acceptanceCriteria: Batch generation for a full round completes within target time
Evaluation runs automatically after batch
Comparison vs baseline prompt available
Promotion/rollback decision logged
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/jobs/batch_runner.py. BatchRunner handles generation + evaluation loop with configurable prompts.

userStories.title: Add baseline comparisons
userStories.description: As the founder, I need baselines so we can judge whether narrative quality is truly improving.
acceptanceCriteria: Baseline prompt designated and compared in reports
Outcome accuracy and narrative score deltas shown
Baseline retained in dashboard filters
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/validation.py with compare_all_prompts(). Dashboard supports prompt filtering for comparison.

userStories.title: Add regression alerts
userStories.description: As the founder, I need warnings when quality drops so we do not ship regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: Alert thresholds defined for narrative score and outcome accuracy
Regression flagged in dashboard
Alerts logged to a report
userStories.notes: Implemented in src/analysis/regression_alerts.py. RegressionMonitor checks thresholds and generates alert summaries.
